overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game. The player character walks along an abandoned rural highway past derelict vehicles including an ambulance, school bus, and pickup trucks. The environment features overgrown vegetation, a distinctive lumberjack statue with a stack of pancakes, and transitions from a small commercial area to a natural riverside setting. The atmosphere is desolate with overcast skies and muted colors typical of survival horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned highway roadside with derelict emergency vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past abandoned emergency vehicles and derelict cars

entered.detail: white and red emergency vehicle with open doors, abandoned on the roadside
derelict black sedan parked behind the ambulance
wooden utility poles with wires stretching along the highway
dense pine trees covering the hills in the background
abandoned fuel station with blue signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside an abandoned rural highway. An ambulance and black sedan sit derelict on the roadside, while power lines stretch toward a distant coniferous forest. The overcast sky casts diffuse light over the desolate scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned commercial strip with school bus and restaurant

events.description: character moves from sidewalk onto the asphalt road surface, school bus comes into view
character adjusts path to pass the red pickup truck on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the abandoned road past a yellow school bus and approaching a restaurant with a large lumberjack statue

entered.detail: yellow school bus abandoned on the roadside with darkened windows
maroon pickup truck with white cargo bed parked near the restaurant
single-story wooden building with green roof and Hungry Jim's signage
massive statue of a lumberjack holding an axe standing on a tall stack of pancakes
white sandbag walls placed near the restaurant entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto the asphalt road, passing a derelict yellow school bus on the left. A red pickup truck and the Hungry Jim's restaurant with its distinctive lumberjack statue become prominent ahead. The environment shows signs of abandonment with sandbag barricades near the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned restaurant plaza with giant lumberjack statue

events.description: passing dead bodies lying in the road near the lumberjack statue
restaurant building recedes as character moves toward open road and yellow trailer

agents.ego_description: walking past the massive lumberjack statue with stacked pancakes and dead bodies on the ground, surveying the abandoned restaurant area

entered.detail: light yellow cargo trailer parked on the roadside ahead
corpse lying face-down on the asphalt near the statue
green industrial waste container near the restaurant

segments.scene_description: The character passes the iconic lumberjack statue holding a stack of pancakes, with dead bodies scattered on the asphalt. The restaurant building falls behind as a yellow cargo trailer comes into view on the left, marking the transition from the commercial area to a more open road.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside road with guard rails and forested hills

events.description: character turns toward the river, leaving the main commercial area behind
approaching the water's edge with white house visible across the river

agents.ego_description: walking toward the riverbank, leaving the abandoned vehicles behind to explore the natural waterfront area

entered.detail: calm waterway flowing alongside the road with rocky banks
two-story white residential building situated across the river
green metal highway guard rail along the roadside
large boulders and rocky outcrops along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward a river flowing alongside the road, passing a yellow trailer. A white house sits across the water amid rocky terrain and dense coniferous forest. Guard rails line the roadside as the environment transitions from abandoned urban infrastructure to natural wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate rural highway that transitions from a derelict commercial strip into a wild riverside landscape. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside an abandoned ambulance and sedan, moving under an overcast sky toward a distant coniferous forest. As the camera shifts onto the asphalt road, it passes a derelict yellow school bus and approaches the Hungry Jim's restaurant, where sandbag barricades and a distinctive lumberjack statue holding pancakes mark the center of the abandoned area. The scene then opens up as the character moves past scattered bodies and a yellow cargo trailer, leaving the restaurant behind for a more open stretch of road. Finally, the camera turns toward a flowing river and rocky terrain, passing roadside guard rails to reveal a white house nestled within a dense forest.
